name: log-analyzer
description: Query and analyze Kubernetes stdout logs and Huawei Cloud LTS logs for CCE workloads.

tools.name: huawei_get_pod_logs
tools.description: Query Kubernetes Pod stdout/stderr logs through the CCE Kubernetes API.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

previous.description: Set true to query logs from the previous terminated container.

tail_lines.description: Number of log lines from the end. Defaults to 100.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_logconfigs
tools.description: List CCE LogConfig resources used for container stdout collection.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_create_cce_logconfig
tools.description: Create a CCE LogConfig for container stdout or container file collection. The tool previews by default and requires confirm=true to create.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

logconfig_name.description: Name of the LogConfig resource to create.

source_type.description: Log source type: container_stdout or container_file.

logconfig_namespace.description: Namespace where the LogConfig CR is created. Defaults to kube-system.

workload_namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace of the target workload. Defaults to namespace or default.

namespace.description: Alias used as workload namespace when workload_namespace is omitted.

workload_name.description: Target workload name. Alias app_name can also be used.

workload_kind.description: Target workload kind, for example Deployment, StatefulSet, DaemonSet. Defaults to Deployment.

container.description: Optional container name. Recommended for container_file.

all_containers.description: For container_stdout, set true to collect all containers. Defaults to true only when no workload is specified.

log_path.description: Directory path for container_file collection, for example /var/log.

file_pattern.description: File pattern for container_file collection, for example *.log. Defaults to *.log.

files.description: Optional JSON array of file objects, for example [{"logPath":"/var/log","filePattern":"*.log"}].

workloads.description: Optional JSON array of workload objects. Overrides singular workload parameters.

processor_type.description: Processor type when processors is omitted. Defaults to singleline.

confirm.description: Must be true to actually create the LogConfig. Omit for preview.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_logconfig
tools.description: Delete a CCE LogConfig by name. The tool previews the target by default and requires confirm=true to delete.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

logconfig_name.description: Name of the LogConfig resource to delete.

logconfig_namespace.description: Namespace where the LogConfig CR exists. Defaults to kube-system.

namespace.description: Alias of logconfig_namespace when logconfig_namespace is omitted.

api_group.description: Optional LogConfig CRD API group. Defaults to logging.openvessel.io.

api_version.description: Optional LogConfig CRD API version. Defaults to v1.

plural.description: Optional LogConfig CRD plural. Defaults to logconfigs.

confirm.description: Must be true to actually delete the LogConfig. Omit for preview.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_get_application_logconfigs
tools.description: Find the LTS log group and stream for a CCE application using LogConfig rules.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_query_cce_audit_logs
tools.description: Query CCE Kubernetes audit logs from LTS and summarize Pod deletion, workload changes, users, verbs, resources, namespaces, and response codes.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

log_group_id.description: Optional audit LTS log group ID. Recommended when known.

log_stream_id.description: Optional audit LTS log stream ID. Recommended when known.

log_group_name.description: Optional log group name substring for audit stream discovery.

log_stream_name.description: Optional log stream name substring for audit stream discovery.

audit_stream_keywords.description: Comma-separated audit stream discovery keywords. Defaults to audit, apiserver, api-server, kube-apiserver.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace keyword. The tool searches audit log content by this value.

resource_name.description: Kubernetes object name keyword. The tool searches audit log content by this value.

pod_name.description: Alias of resource_name for Pod audit queries.

workload_name.description: Alias of resource_name for workload audit queries.

verb.description: Single Kubernetes audit verb keyword, for example delete, patch, update.

resource.description: Single Kubernetes resource keyword, for example pods or deployments.

status_code.description: Kubernetes audit response status code keyword.

content_keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords that must exist in the audit log content. Object name and namespace are automatically added when provided.

start_time.description: Start time, for example 2026-05-30 10:00:00 or epoch milliseconds.

end_time.description: End time, for example 2026-05-30 11:00:00 or epoch milliseconds.

hours.description: Recent time window in hours when start_time/end_time are not provided. Defaults to 1.

labels.description: Optional JSON object with extra LTS label filters.

limit.description: Per-page log query limit. Defaults to 500.

auto_paginate.description: Set true to automatically fetch additional LTS pages. Defaults to true.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch. Defaults to 5.

sample_limit.description: Maximum matched audit events to return. Defaults to 50.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_query_application_logs
tools.description: Query application logs from the matched LTS log stream.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

logconfig_name.description: Optional CCE LogConfig policy name. When set, query this policy's LTS stream and add logconfig=<name> to label filters.

start_time.description: Start time, for example 2026-05-30 10:00:00 or epoch milliseconds.

end_time.description: End time, for example 2026-05-30 11:00:00 or epoch milliseconds.

labels.description: Optional JSON object with extra LTS label filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of logs. Defaults to 1000.

auto_paginate.description: Set true to automatically fetch additional LTS pages using returned scroll_id. Defaults to false.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch when auto_paginate=true. Defaults to 10.

scroll_id.description: Optional LTS scroll ID for continuing a previous query.

is_iterative.description: Whether to enable iterative LTS query mode. Defaults to true when auto_paginate=true.

is_desc.description: Whether to return logs in descending order. Defaults to true.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_query_application_recent_logs
tools.description: Query recent application logs from the matched LTS log stream.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

logconfig_name.description: Optional CCE LogConfig policy name. When set, query this policy's LTS stream and add logconfig=<name> to label filters.

hours.description: Recent time window in hours. Defaults to 1.

labels.description: Optional JSON object with extra LTS label filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of logs. Defaults to 1000.

auto_paginate.description: Set true to automatically fetch additional LTS pages using returned scroll_id. Defaults to false.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch when auto_paginate=true. Defaults to 10.

scroll_id.description: Optional LTS scroll ID for continuing a previous query.

is_iterative.description: Whether to enable iterative LTS query mode. Defaults to true when auto_paginate=true.

is_desc.description: Whether to return logs in descending order. Defaults to true.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_analyze_application_logs
tools.description: Analyze application logs in a time range for abnormal keywords, HTTP errors, incident windows, recovery time, and abnormal ratios.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

logconfig_name.description: Optional CCE LogConfig policy name. When set, query this policy's LTS stream and add logconfig=<name> to label filters.

start_time.description: Start time, for example 2026-05-30 10:00:00 or epoch milliseconds. If omitted, hours is used.

end_time.description: End time, for example 2026-05-30 11:00:00 or epoch milliseconds. If omitted, hours is used.

hours.description: Recent time window in hours when start_time/end_time are not provided. Defaults to 1.

labels.description: Optional JSON object with extra LTS label filters.

keywords.description: Optional LTS keyword filter. Ratios are calculated only over keyword-matched logs when set.

limit.description: Per-page log query limit. Defaults to 1000.

auto_paginate.description: Set true to automatically fetch additional LTS pages. Defaults to true for analysis.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch. Defaults to 10.

error_patterns.description: Optional JSON array or comma-separated regex patterns treated as errors.

warning_patterns.description: Optional JSON array or comma-separated regex patterns treated as warnings.

http_error_status_threshold.description: HTTP status code threshold treated as error. Defaults to 500.

include_http_4xx.description: Set true to include HTTP 4xx responses as warning anomalies. Defaults to false.

incident_gap_minutes.description: Maximum gap between abnormal logs to group into one incident window. Defaults to 5.

sample_limit.description: Maximum abnormal sample logs to return. Defaults to 20.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
